nf/quick-337-fast-path-initial-diagnosti.task_description: Add graph-first discovery to formal-scope-scan.cjs and extract a unified semantic+graph search module shared by both formal-scope-scan.cjs and candidate-discovery.cjs
nf/quick-337-fast-path-initial-diagnosti.approach: Extract shared semantic and graph search functions from formal-scope-scan.cjs and candidate-discovery.cjs into a unified search module, and add graph-first discovery to formal-scope-scan.cjs Layer 1-2 matching pipeline.
out_of_scope: Refactoring the full candidate-discovery.cjs pipeline or ensemble methods
Implementing new Layer 3/Layer 4 semantic or agentic search algorithms beyond what exists
Modifying the bug-mode matching or bug-model-gaps persistence logic
Changing model registry structure or requirement coverage tracking
Performance optimization or caching layer for semantic embeddings
Adding new formal model types or formalism detection beyond tla/alloy
